# chalk_telemetry_binding (Resource)

Manages a binding between a Chalk cluster and a gateway.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the cluster to bind to the gateway.
- `telemetry_deployment_id` (String) The ID of the cluster gateway to bind to the cluster.
